name: Validation of Segmentation against Ground Truth
description: Perform a rigorous validation of a segmentation workflow by comparing it against ground truth data. Your goal is to process the synthetic cell image `~/ImageJ_Data/raw/BBBC005/SIMCEPImages_A01_C1_F1_s01_w1.TIF` using a Gaussian Blur (sigma=2) and an Otsu threshold to generate a binary segmentation mask. Quantitatively compare this result to the ground truth binary mask located at `~/ImageJ_Data/raw/BBBC005_ground_truth/SIMCEPImages_A01_C1_F1_s01_w1.TIF` by calculating the pixel-level difference. Save the difference image to `~/ImageJ_Data/results/segmentation_difference.tif` and export the validation metrics, including the mean intensity of the difference, to `~/ImageJ_Data/results/validation_metrics.csv`.
